race.description: Dubbo Rsl 178 Restaurant Country Boosted Hcp (Bm66)
race.comment: BOLO MISS (7) well drawn today and brings the right form to score a well-deserved victory. Just over three weeks between runs when back in class and trip for a game second over 1000m at Warren.  Can stalk the good tempo and get the better of these. BOUNDING BON (8) warmed up late after drifting back from the inside draw with a respectable sixth over 1000m at Warren. Open to improvement and is among the top chances. PLENITUDE (9) back marker who will appreciate the fast tempo. Strong through the line when fifth over 1000m at Warren. Well drawn with senior rider going aboard. Respect. PRINCE OF SEPANG (2) surprise winner at Mudgee and must be kept safe.
